content: I am curious if anyone ported the patches by @José Expósito to 6.8?

If anyone runs into this failing:

diff --git a/rust/kernel/kunit.rs b/rust/kernel/kunit.rs
index 791b67067b96..db62fbf06785 100644
--- a/rust/kernel/kunit.rs
+++ b/rust/kernel/kunit.rs
@@ -252,6 +252,7 @@ macro_rules! kunit_unsafe_test_suite {
                     debugfs: core::ptr::null_mut(),
                     log: core::ptr::null_mut(),
                     suite_init_err: 0,
+                    is_init: false,
                 });

             // SAFETY: `KUNIT_TEST_SUITE` is static.
Andreas Hindborg has marked this topic as resolved.
